mcp:tool-listener.name: get-payplan
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: get-payplan Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get active pay plan for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: GET Pay Plan
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: create-payplan
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: create-payplan Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Create pay plan for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: POST Create Pay Plan
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization, "Content-Type": "application/json" }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: get-agency-payplan
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: get-agency-payplan Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get agency pay plan for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: GET Agency Pay Plan
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: get-recommend-budget
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: get-recommend-budget Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get recommend budget for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: GET Recommend Budget
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: add-budget
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: add-budget Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Add budget for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: PUT Add Budget
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization, "Content-Type": "application/json" }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: cancel-budget
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: cancel-budget Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Cancel budget for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: PUT Cancel Budget
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization, "Content-Type": "application/json" }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: get-active-payplan
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: get-active-payplan Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get active payplan for a given account

http:request.doc:name: GET Active Pay Plan
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: update-payplan
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: update-payplan Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Update or cancel payplan for a given payplan id

http:request.doc:name: PUT Update Pay Plan
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization, "Content-Type": "application/json" }]

mcp:tool-listener.name: get-payplan-override
mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: get-payplan-override Tool
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Get payplan override for a given account id

http:request.doc:name: GET Pay Plan Override
http:request.http:headers: #[output application/java --- { "Source-System": vars.toolParams.sourceSystem, "Target-System": vars.toolParams.targetSystem, "X-Correlation-Id": vars.toolParams.correlationId, "authToken": vars.toolParams.authToken, "Authorization": vars.toolParams.authorization }]

mcp:resource-listener.name: Server Overview
mcp:resource-listener.doc:name: Server Overview Resource
mcp:resource-listener.mcp:description: Overview of the customer-payplan-mcp-server including available tools and API information

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { serverName: "customer-payplan-mcp-server", serverVersion: "1.0.0", description: "MCP server exposing customer pay plan operations for account management", apiBasePath: p('api.basePath'), apiHost: p('api.host'), tools: [ { name: "get-payplan", method: "GET", description: "Get active pay plan for a given account id" }, { name: "create-payplan", method: "POST", description: "Create pay plan for a given account id" }, { name: "get-agency-payplan", method: "GET", description: "Get agency pay plan for a given account id" }, { name: "get-recommend-budget", method: "GET", description: "Get recommend budget for a given account id" }, { name: "add-budget", method: "PUT", description: "Add budget for a given account id" }, { name: "cancel-budget", method: "PUT", description: "Cancel budget for a given account id" }, { name: "get-active-payplan", method: "GET", description: "Get active payplan for a given account" }, { name: "update-payplan", method: "PUT", description: "Update or cancel payplan for a given payplan id" }, { name: "get-payplan-override", method: "GET", description: "Get payplan override for a given account id" } ], resources: [ { uri: "resource://server/overview", description: "This resource - server overview" }, { uri: "resource://tools/catalog", description: "Detailed tool catalog with parameter schemas" }, { uri: "resource://api/endpoints", description: "Backend API endpoint documentation" } ] }

mcp:resource-listener.name: Tool Catalog
mcp:resource-listener.doc:name: Tool Catalog Resource
mcp:resource-listener.mcp:description: Detailed catalog of all tools with their parameter schemas and usage examples

mcp:resource-listener.name: API Endpoints
mcp:resource-listener.doc:name: API Endpoints Resource
mcp:resource-listener.mcp:description: Documentation of the backend API endpoints used by this MCP server

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { apiName: "Customer PayPlan V3 PAPI", basePath: p('api.basePath'), host: p('api.host'), port: p('api.port'), protocol: "HTTPS", endpoints: [ { method: "GET", path: "/account/{accountId}/payplan", description: "Get pay plan for account", tool: "get-payplan" }, { method: "POST", path: "/account/{accountId}/payplan", description: "Create pay plan for account", tool: "create-payplan" }, { method: "GET", path: "/account/{accountId}/agencypayplan", description: "Get agency pay plan for account", tool: "get-agency-payplan" }, { method: "GET", path: "/account/{accountId}/recommendbudget", description: "Get recommend budget for account", tool: "get-recommend-budget" }, { method: "PUT", path: "/account/{accountId}/addbudget", description: "Add budget for account", tool: "add-budget" }, { method: "PUT", path: "/account/{accountId}/cancelbudget", description: "Cancel budget for account", tool: "cancel-budget" }, { method: "GET", path: "/account/{accountId}/activepayplan", description: "Get active payplan for account", tool: "get-active-payplan" }, { method: "PUT", path: "/payplan/{payplanId}", description: "Update or cancel payplan", tool: "update-payplan" }, { method: "GET", path: "/account/{accountId}/payplanoverride", description: "Get payplan override for account", tool: "get-payplan-override" } ], requiredHeaders: [ { name: "Source-System", description: "Source system identifier" }, { name: "Target-System", description: "Target system identifier" }, { name: "X-Correlation-Id", description: "Correlation ID for request tracking" }, { name: "authToken", description: "Authentication token" }, { name: "Authorization", description: "Basic authorization header value" } ] }
